title: The Trap Begins to Crack
description: On pages 18–19, the trap begins to crack as mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks.
scene: The Trap Begins to Crack. Mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: W-Wait a minute! Your legs are bleeding!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, I was about half-done cutting them... haha.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How is that not being in trouble!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Could you destroy this pillar for us? I'll leave the rest to you.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Oh we'll see about that, won't we?
